mapper.select: SELECT te.id, te.user_id, u.name AS userName, te.item_id, te.focus_id AS focusSessionId, te.event_type, te.description, te.event_data, te.is_public, te.created_at FROM timeline_event te, user u WHERE te.user_id = u.id ORDER BY te.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM timeline_event WHERE id IN
#{id}
